summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience designing and operating data pipelines, SQL/Oracle platforms, telemetry analytics, and AWS-based data solutions. Strong fit for AWS-native data lake, ingestion, cataloging, transformation, and operational analytics work using Python, SQL, PySpark/Spark, S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Oracle, Airflow, and production monitoring practices. Experienced translating large-scale operational and sensor-like telemetry into reliable data products, executive reporting, forecasting, and decision support for mission-critical environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable, monitored data workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL concepts, Redshift analytics workloads, and Oracle schemas for historical telemetry retention and forecasting.
Designed and optimized Oracle data models and reporting structures to support operational analytics, capacity risk forecasting, and executive-level decision-making.
Used PySpark/Spark patterns to process large-scale telemetry and support parallel forecasting workloads across high-volume infrastructure data.
Developed Prophet and scikit-learn forecasting models to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead, connecting data engineering pipelines to operational AI/ML use cases.
Integrated disparate monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting datasets with validation, reconciliation, and data quality checks.
Created Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards for real-time capacity insights, operational efficiency, and senior stakeholder reporting.
Supported production reliability through monitoring, troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, documentation, and repeatable runbook-style operating practices.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, strengthening observability for production web and mobile platforms.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to identify optimization opportunities and provide actionable recommendations to engineering teams.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing across web and mobile systems to improve visibility into user experience and application performance.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM telemetry and support performance-driven release decisions.
Participated in AWS cloud migration readiness discussions by evaluating monitoring coverage, performance risks, and operational data requirements.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM subject matter expert for a large enterprise environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules that improved operational visibility and became standards across client environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual weekly export work.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to diagnose bottlenecks using APM telemetry, SQL/Oracle data, thread behavior, and infrastructure signals.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and client training for monitoring standards, agent deployments, and production troubleshooting.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while maintaining strict performance and reliability expectations.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++, OCCI, OCI, SQL, and Oracle, reducing physical hardware footprint while preserving sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets during phased cutover.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to protect data integrity across relational database migration paths.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability telecom billing interfaces using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Oracle, XML, socket programming, POSIX threads, and production Unix environments.
Improved throughput and database performance in billing processes through SQL tuning, sequence optimization, memory reduction, and interface-level performance analysis.
Built and maintained reporting, invoicing, settlement, and integration components across full billing lifecycle systems for large-scale telecom operations.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration and deployment support with Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual operational effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, C++, C, Perl, Korn Shell, Java, XML, JSON
skills.AWS Data Platform: Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, AWS data lake patterns; Kinesis/MSK awareness
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, ingestion workflows, data lakes, data warehouses, dimensional modeling, data quality, reconciliation, metadata, cataloging concepts, reporting layers
skills.Big Data & Orchestration: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, Airflow, distributed processing, batch processing, orchestration patterns
skills.Databases: Oracle, Oracle RAC, PL/SQL, SQL optimization, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server concepts, relational data modeling
skills.Observability & Telemetry: BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Introscope, Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, AppDynamics, telemetry analysis, dashboards, alerts, thresholds, transaction tracing
skills.AI/ML & Forecasting: Prophet, scikit-learn, capacity forecasting, telemetry-based prediction, AI/ML data pipeline support, Bedrock and GenAI project exposure
skills.Delivery & Reliability: Git, Docker, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, production support, root-cause analysis, runbooks, technical documentation, stakeholder communication

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Designed an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to transform enterprise telemetry into bottleneck predictions and operational decision support.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, PySpark, Parquet, and Snappy compression for cloud-scale ingestion, transformation, query, and AI-enabled access.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python pipeline for job intake, semantic duplicate detection, LLM scoring, JSON artifact generation, quality gates, and tracking using FAISS, sentence-transformers, Grok API, and Claude Code workflows.

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Mined real-user and synthetic performance metrics from Dynatrace and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify performance improvements for critical revenue-generating systems.
